title: tetragonia coronata
intro: Tetragonia coronata, also known as New Zealand spinach or kōkihi, is a species of flowering plant native to New Zealand, known for its edible leaves and stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Tetragonia coronata include its ability to support cardiovascular health, boost the immune system, and aid in the management of conditions such as high blood pressure and arthritis. Tetragonia coronata can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural health practitioners.
